install.windows_download: Open https://zcode.z.ai/cn#all-downloads in the browser, click the Windows download. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default; installs to %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\ZCode.
install.macos_download: Open https://zcode.z.ai/cn#all-downloads in the browser, click the macOS download (.dmg). Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux_download: Open https://zcode.z.ai/cn#all-downloads in the browser, download the Linux build (.deb / .rpm / AppImage) and install it.
install.note: GUI desktop application (Electron) — an OpenCode-based coding agent by Z.AI (Zhipu). Always tell the user the download location and ask them to run the installer themselves.

install_flow.summary: Download installer from zcode.z.ai -> user double-clicks -> follow the install wizard
agent_steps: Open https://zcode.z.ai/cn#all-downloads and download the installer for the detected OS to the Downloads folder.
After the download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Open the installer (Start-Process on Windows, open on macOS).
Tell the user to follow the install wizard to finish.
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That they should click through the wizard themselves

identity_guard.description: ZCode is Z.AI's (Zhipu) GUI desktop coding agent, based on OpenCode. It is DIFFERENT from OpenCode Desktop and from the OpenCode CLI. Its config lives under ~/.zcode/v2/config.json.
